failures.description: The agent invented an unsupported cheapest item and price instead of using the first item from the ProductCatalogSearch result.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The correct tool call was made and returned sorted results, with the cheapest available item being item_id 1240311797 priced at $137.17. At index 4, the agent produced an answer claiming item 0000000000 costs $0.01. That item_id and price are absent from all prior user input and tool output, and the agent relied on this fabricated information as the final answer. The later evaluator approval repeats the same false claim, but the first unresolved failure occurs at index 4.
